links.title: Main Service Debugging
links.tooltip: Open the main service debugging dashboard

panels.title: How to use this dashboard
panels.description: Dashboard notes and operating guidance.

options.content:
### Purpose
At-a-glance production platform health and restore confidence for Conorganizer.

Use this dashboard from top to bottom: **current status -> backups -> filesystem capacity -> VPS resources -> SQLite -> HTTP/TLS -> system errors**.

Design choices:
- Infrastructure panels follow USE: utilization, saturation, and errors.
- Service-facing panels use public blackbox probes for symptoms before digging into causes.
- Loki panels should work with broad `job` labels; narrow `loki_job` after import if labels are available.
- Prometheus panels require node_exporter, blackbox_exporter, and systemd collector metrics.
- Optional SQLite/backup size panels require future textfile/custom metrics.

Useful external examples:
- Node Exporter Full: https://grafana.com/grafana/dashboards/1860-node-exporter-full/
- Prometheus Blackbox Exporter: https://grafana.com/grafana/dashboards/14928-prometheus-blackbox-exporter/
- Caddy Monitoring: https://grafana.com/grafana/dashboards/22806-caddy-monitoring/
- Loki Dashboard: https://grafana.com/grafana/dashboards/13186-loki-dashboard/

panels.title: Main website probe
panels.description: Requires blackbox_exporter. Shows whether the public main website probe is currently succeeding.

panels.title: Grafana probe
panels.description: Requires blackbox_exporter. Shows whether the public Grafana probe is currently succeeding.

panels.title: Caddy active
panels.description: Requires node_exporter systemd collector metrics. Alert candidate: Caddy not active.

panels.title: Main service active
panels.description: Requires node_exporter systemd collector metrics. Alert candidate: conorganizer-main.service not active.

panels.title: SQLite backup age
panels.description: Optional future custom/textfile metric. Expected SQLite backup cadence is every 15 minutes. Alert candidate: older than 2 hours.

panels.title: Image backup age
panels.description: Optional future custom/textfile metric. Expected image backup cadence is daily around 03:30 UTC. Alert candidate: older than 26 hours.

panels.title: Mounted volume usage
panels.description: Requires node_exporter filesystem metrics with /mnt not excluded. Alert candidate: >80%, critical around 90%.

panels.title: Backup failures, 24h
panels.description: Log-derived backup failure count from the stable backup script prefixes. Green should be zero.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job=~"$loki_job"} |= "conorganizer-" |~ "failed|does not exist|sanity check failed|integrity check failed|ERROR|error" [24h]))

panels.title: Critical system log signal, 1h
panels.description: Broad platform error search. Treat non-zero as a prompt to inspect the System errors row.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job=~"$loki_job"} |~ "Failed to start|failed with result|Start request repeated too quickly|kernel.*error|no space left on device|panic" [1h]))

panels.title: TLS days: main
panels.description: Requires blackbox_exporter TLS probe metrics. Alert candidate: less than 14 days.

panels.title: SQLite backup logs
panels.description: Stable prefix emitted by the SQLite backup script. Use this to confirm recent backup activity and integrity-check output.

panels.title: Image backup logs
panels.description: Stable prefix emitted by the image backup script. Use this to confirm daily image backup activity.

panels.title: Backup failure count
panels.description: Log-derived backup failure trend. Non-zero values should be investigated.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job=~"$loki_job"} |= "conorganizer-" |~ "failed|does not exist|sanity check failed|integrity check failed|ERROR|error" [15m]))

panels.title: SQLite backup age
panels.description: Optional future metric from textfile collector/custom exporter. Shows hours since last successful SQLite backup.

panels.title: Image backup age
panels.description: Optional future metric from textfile collector/custom exporter. Shows hours since last successful image backup.

panels.title: Backup directory size
panels.description: Optional future metric for /mnt/HC_Volume_103911252/backups. Useful for restore confidence and capacity trend tracking.

panels.title: Backup failure logs
panels.description: Detailed logs for backup failures. This uses broad filters so it works before journal labels are refined.

targets.expr: {job=~"$loki_job"} |= "conorganizer-" |~ "failed|does not exist|sanity check failed|integrity check failed|ERROR|error"

panels.title: Root filesystem usage
panels.description: node_exporter filesystem usage for /. Watch for sustained growth.

panels.title: Mounted volume usage
panels.description: node_exporter filesystem usage for the Hetzner volume. Requires node_exporter to include /mnt mountpoints.

panels.title: Mounted volume available bytes
panels.description: Available bytes on the mounted Hetzner volume.

panels.title: Root inode usage
panels.description: Inode exhaustion can break writes even when bytes are still available.

panels.title: Mounted volume inode usage
panels.description: Inode usage on the mounted Hetzner volume.

panels.title: Filesystem growth proxy
panels.description: Approximate daily used-byte growth on the mounted volume. Negative values can happen after cleanup.

panels.title: CPU usage
panels.description: CPU utilization from node_exporter. This is a USE utilization signal.

panels.title: Memory usage
panels.description: Memory capacity utilization from node_exporter.

panels.title: Load average 1m
panels.description: CPU saturation proxy. Compare with CPU count in node_cpu_seconds_total if this becomes concerning.

panels.title: Network receive rate
panels.description: Network ingress throughput excluding common local/container interfaces.

panels.title: Network transmit rate
panels.description: Network egress throughput excluding common local/container interfaces.

panels.title: SQLite DB file size
panels.description: Optional future custom/textfile metric for /mnt/HC_Volume_103911252/environments/main/database/events.db.

panels.title: SQLite WAL file size
panels.description: Optional future custom/textfile metric. A fast-growing WAL can indicate checkpoint or write pressure issues.

panels.title: SQLite backup size
panels.description: Optional future custom/textfile metric. Useful for spotting backup truncation or unusual DB growth.

panels.title: Database symptom count
panels.description: Log-derived database symptom count from app and backup logs.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({job=~"$loki_job"} |~ "sqlite|SQLite|database is locked|database is busy|integrity check|constraint failed|FOREIGN KEY" [5m]))

panels.title: SQLite and database logs
panels.description: Detailed DB symptom logs. This catches app errors and backup integrity-check messages.

targets.expr: {job=~"$loki_job"} |~ "sqlite|SQLite|database is locked|database is busy|integrity check|constraint failed|FOREIGN KEY"

panels.title: TLS days remaining: main
panels.description: Blackbox TLS expiry for the public main host. Red below 14 days, yellow below 30.

panels.title: TLS days remaining: Grafana
panels.description: Blackbox TLS expiry for Grafana. Red below 14 days, yellow below 30.

panels.title: HTTP probe duration
panels.description: Blackbox probe duration for the public entrypoints.

panels.title: HTTP status code
panels.description: Blackbox HTTP status code for the public entrypoints.

panels.title: HTTP probe success
panels.description: Blackbox probe success over time. This is the user-facing symptom signal.

panels.title: Recent Caddy errors
panels.description: Caddy errors, failed reloads, and gateway errors. Prefer exact journal labels after import if they exist.

panels.title: Recent systemd/service failures
panels.description: Broad systemd failure search from journal/syslog logs.

targets.expr: {job=~"$loki_job"} |~ "Failed to start|failed with result|Start request repeated too quickly|Main process exited|code=exited"

panels.title: Recent Loki/Promtail/Alloy errors
panels.description: Logging pipeline errors. Important because broken logging can hide app and backup failures.

panels.title: Recent critical logs
panels.description: High-signal platform failures that can affect recovery confidence.

targets.expr: {job=~"$loki_job"} |~ "critical|CRITICAL|panic|no space left on device|read-only file system|segfault|OOM|Out of memory"
